summary: Phase 9 refactoring of OrdersMap.js tested successfully. The usePriorityOrders hook integration is working correctly. Frontend compiles without errors. File reduced from 2273 to 1980 lines (~293 lines saved). Build successful. Lint passed. No JavaScript errors on delivery dashboard.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when updating availability status - 'فشل في تحديث حالة التوفر'

frontend_compilation.message: webpack compiled successfully after usePriorityOrders hook integration

usePriorityOrders_hook_integration.hook_usage: PASS - Lines 162-171: Correctly destructures priorityOrder, priorityCountdown, showPriorityPopup, acceptPriorityOrder, rejectPriorityOrder, rejectedOrderIds, maxLimitOrderIds
usePriorityOrders_hook_integration.no_duplicate_declarations: PASS - No duplicate useState for priority-related state found
usePriorityOrders_hook_integration.no_duplicate_functions: PASS - No duplicate acceptPriorityOrder/rejectPriorityOrder functions found
usePriorityOrders_hook_integration.hook_values_used: PASS - Hook values used in PriorityPopup and ExternalPriorityPopup components

features: Rejected orders tracking with localStorage persistence

delivery_dashboard_test.message: Delivery dashboard loads without JavaScript errors
delivery_dashboard_test.notes: Map button disabled when 0 orders (expected behavior)

changes_made: Added import for usePriorityOrders hook at line 63
Replaced inline priority order state management with usePriorityOrders hook at lines 162-171
Removed ~293 lines of duplicate priority order code including:
- useState declarations for priorityOrder, priorityCountdown, showPriorityPopup, etc.

hook_returns.priorityOrder: Current priority order object or null
hook_returns.acceptPriorityOrder: Async function to accept priority order
hook_returns.maxLimitOrderIds: Array of orders deferred due to max limit

code_review_comments: usePriorityOrders hook is properly implemented with all necessary functionality
Hook correctly manages localStorage persistence for rejected orders
Sound notifications and voice announcements are properly integrated
No duplicate state declarations found after refactoring
Hook values are correctly used in PriorityPopup and ExternalPriorityPopup components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 refactoring completed successfully. usePriorityOrders hook integrated into OrdersMap.js. File reduced from 2273 to 1980 lines (~293 lines saved). Frontend compiles without errors. Delivery dashboard loads correctly. Note: Full map testing requires orders to be present and a driver account. The provided credentials are for an admin account which can access the delivery dashboard but the map button is disabled when there are 0 orders.
